entry.title: Julien added 'Kids, Wait Till You Hear This!'
entry.content: 📚 “Kids, Wait Till You Hear This!” by Liza Minnelli ⭐️ Rated: 4/5 📝 "An all-around surprisingly honest autobiography, told in her own voice and tone. Liza Minnelli doesn’t seem to hide much in this candid account, even if one suspects she may have left a few things for the unauthorized biography that will inevitably come one day. It’s a swift yet surprisingly deep read, revealing a true trooper, resilient, complex, and unwavering in the face of it all. ⸻ Une autobiographie étonnamment honnête, racontée avec sa propre voix et son ton singulier. Liza Minnelli ne se..." 🏷️ #LizaMinnelli
